text: - d. Outdoor :  Countertop, bar top material shall be 3 cm thick thick granite, color/type basis of design Typ. Bianco Antico, supplied by Dal-Tile, with 1/8 inch eased radius on top and bottom edges. Subcontractor to supply  and  install  1/2  inch  thick  plate  steel  lintel  support/s  as  needed  beneath  countertop  spans  per subcontract drawings.
